ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., transformer, BERT, CNN) */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., hyperparameter tuning, model evaluation) */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used for the experiment (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perplexity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the model in the experiment */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step in the training process */,
  "perplexity_valid" REAL /* Perplexity value at the given rank and step */,
  "perplexity_valid_min" REAL /* Minimum perplexity value at the given rank and step */,
  "perplexity_valid_max" REAL /* Maximum perplexity value at the given rank and step */,
  "perplexity_train" REAL /* Perplexity on the training set at the given rank and step */,
  "perplexity_train_min" REAL /* Minimum perplexity on the training set at the given rank and step */,
  "perplexity_train_max" REAL /* Maximum perplexity on the training set at the given rank and step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perplexity_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., AI Research, ML Engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view details, edit hyperparameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, note, log) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_documents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, note, log) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_documents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hyperparameter, architecture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hyperparameter, architecture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment using the external data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data source was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_external_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model using the external data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data source was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_external_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
